user_story: Explore the GMX v2 perp DEX on Arbitrum: pull current oracle prices, list the GM markets with funding/OI, then peek at an example trader's open positions.

turns.prompt: Show me current GMX V2 oracle prices for the top tokens on Arbitrum.
Now list the active GM markets on Arbitrum with their funding rates and open interest.
What positions does this trader 0x1f5ae22a4f63aa64f0d0c93b06aff09b3a35528a hold on GMX Arbitrum right now?
